title: xdg-user-dirs bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[0.18-7]
- Backport patches to install systemd units to fix initialization races
  Resolves: RHEL-79119
- Fix minor spec formatting inconsistencies
